identity.officialCurrentName: MenteeBot (公式サイトはバージョン表記なし。NVIDIA公式カスタマーストーリーは『MenteeBot V3.0』と明記)
identity.variant: MenteeBot V3 (third-generation; NVIDIA customer story explicitly names 'MenteeBot V3.0', while Mentee's own current product page displays specs without an explicit version label)
identity.reason: Confirmed on Mentee Robotics' own current product page (menteebot.com/bot/) and independently on NVIDIA's official customer-story page naming 'MenteeBot V3.0'. Mobileye announced a definitive agreement (2026-01-06, ~$900M) to acquire Mentee Robotics; official coverage states Mentee will operate as an independent unit within Mobileye and continue MenteeBot development toward PoC deployments in 2026 and series production targeted 2028 — this is an ownership change, not a product discontinuation.

identity.variant: Q5 wheeled service humanoid (distinct model from L7 bipedal and M7 upper-body-only)
identity.reason: Q5 is listed on RobotEra's own product line (robotera.com/en/enq5) and was showcased at CES 2026 (Jan 2026) alongside L7 and XHAND1 as part of the current lineup. RBTX marketplace lists RobotEra itself as the seller. No numeric spec could be independently confirmed on RobotEra's own JS-rendered product page directly (access limitation), so specs below rely on the RBTX official-store listing and convergent CES 2026 press coverage.

identity.variant: aeo — Aeolus's third-generation dual-arm service robot, debuted CES 2023; officially distinguished from the company's 'first single-arm robot in 2018'
identity.reason: aeo is the sole product featured on Aeolus Robotics' current official site (aeolusbot.com), with dedicated current solution pages (disinfect/care/delivery/security), a mobile app, leasing/subscription plans, and named customer testimonials presented in the present tense on the current homepage. Aeolus's own CES2023 press release (PRNewswire, 2023-01-04) explicitly frames aeo as a third-generation, dual-arm advance distinct from 'our first single-arm robot in 2018' — this resolves the ambiguity DATA-R01 flagged: the 2019 Marubun PDF almost certainly refers to that earlier single-arm generation, but the CURRENT aeolusbot.com homepage independently carries a present-tense Marubun executive testimonial explicitly describing a 'two-armed humanoid robot' — i.e. the aeo generation — which is usable as current official-page evidence per this batch's instructions regardless of the older PDF's ambiguity.

proposedValue.name: 丸文株式会社 (Marubun Corporation)
proposedValue.evidence: 現行公式ホームページ（aeolusbot.com）に丸文 Satoshi Fujino氏（Senior Vice President）の証言が現在形で掲載され、'we are confident that Aeolus's robotic services will become a major part of our service-oriented business...currently promoting Aeolus's highly capable, two-armed humanoid robot, for use in nursing care, hospitals, and security markets'と明記。『two-armed』の表現はaeo世代の特徴と一致し、2019年の丸文PDF（旧世代の可能性がある単腕機時代の資料）とは独立に、現行公式ページ自体が丸文の現行取扱いを裏付けている。

candidates.scopeNote: 現行公式ホームページに現在形の証言として掲載。介護現場での省力化を目的とした活用を明記。公式CESプレスリリースでも同社との提携が言及されている。
candidates.reason: 最大3件の既存Source URLだけを最終登録できる候補。Sourceメタデータの人間確認は別途必要。

source.reviewReason: R02の出典メタデータを人間確認してRobot.sourcesへ追加する。

currentFeatures.feature: 二腕構成（一方が作業、他方がドア開閉・エレベーター操作）
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: 'Equipped with two arms, aeo uses one to perform vital tasks... while aeo's second arm operates elevators and opens doors'と明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。

currentFeatures.feature: 改造無しでのエレベーター自律搭乗
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: GLOBESHIP社CEOの証言として'currently the only robot in the world that can get on and off elevators autonomously'と現行ホームページに明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。

currentFeatures.feature: アクセサリーマウントポイント（拡張機能）
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: 'A new accessory mount expands aeo's ability to take on new tasks'と明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。

currentFeatures.feature: 継続学習による精度向上
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: 'aeo improves over time as it interacts with its surroundings—increasing accuracy through learning'と明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。

currentFeatures.feature: 障害物回避を伴う自律ナビゲーション
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: 'aeo dynamically navigates the environment avoiding obstacles and reacting to people in real-time'と明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。

currentFeatures.feature: モバイルアプリからの遠隔アクセス・操作
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: 'Access aeo anywhere, anytime with our user-friendly mobile app'と明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。

currentFeatures.feature: リースプラン・CapExゼロのサブスクリプション提供
currentFeatures.evidenceSummary: 'Imagine robotic services at zero CapEx. Experience the benefits of aeo without upfront costs'と明記。
currentFeatures.reason: currentFeaturesは現行Robot schemaにないため、aeo pilot後の別設計で扱う。
